title: US civil rights leader Cesar Chavez accused of sexual abuse
description: The allegations have prompted the cancellations of events and celebrations planned in his honour later this month.
content:
US civil rights leader Cesar Chavez, who was known for advocating for the rights of farm workers, has been accused of sexual abuse.
Dolores Huerta said in the 1960s, Chavez, who co-founded the United Farm Workers union (UFW) with her, once "manipulat... [2793 chars]

title: Ryan Gosling on blending humour and sci-fi in new film Project Hail Mary
description: The Canadian actor stars as a science teacher turned astronaut in sci-fi film Project Hail Mary.
content:
Humour and science fiction may not seem obvious bedfellows but a history of cinema will tell you different. Think Spaceballs, Mars Attacks! and Everything Everwhere All At Once to name but a few. And now Ryan Gosling is hopping on board.

title: US aircraft carrier to sail for Crete for repairs after fire on board
description: The USS Gerald R Ford has played a significant role in US operations during the war with Iran.
content:
The US Navy's most advanced aircraft carrier, the USS Gerald R Ford, is preparing to leave the Red Sea for repairs in Crete after a fire on board injured sailors and caused significant damage, US officials have said.
It will travel to a US Navy base ... [1748 chars]

title: Impact of Iran war expected to bring hold in interest rates
description: Before the conflict began, analysts had expected a cut in the Bank rate at this meeting.
content:
Economic impacts of the war in Iran are expected to lead the Bank of England to hold interest rates later.
Before the conflict began, analysts had predicted a cut in the Bank rate at this meeting, but upheaval in the markets and a higher oil price ha... [2397 chars]

title: UK sets targets to boost steel making and cut imports
description: Up to half of steel used in Britain should be made there, the government says, as it announces its steel strategy.
content:
The government has set a target for the UK make half of the steel it uses and has announced higher taxes on buying steel from overseas.
Imported steel quotas will be lowered and anything brought in above that level will be subject to a new 50% tariff... [3471 chars]
